_meta.purpose: The ONLY hand-edited home for observed data-state numbers. Every other appearance is a generated region: <!--na:KEY-->VALUE<!--/na--> markers in authored Markdown and {{KEY}} tokens in Plan/*.html.tmpl. Edit here, then `make build`; `make check` fails on drift.
_meta.rebuild: n_assets_seed = count of GIT-TRACKED data/seed/*_ohlcv_1h.parquet (the gate verifies this live; seeds exported at runtime by the S.1 loop are pending-batch research artifacts and stay untracked until committed WITH an n_assets_seed + duckdb_rows_bars_1h bump in the same commit); duckdb_rows_bars_1h = `select count(*) from bars_1h` after `make build-db` over the committed seed set.
_meta.not_here: Feature counts come live from Features/*/feature_registry.json (implemented==true) and config values live from config/*.json — the gate derives them at render time so they can never drift.
